description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unit tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix job strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and compilers (gcc, clang). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up Python 3.11, install dependencies with pip and uv, run the install script, and then run tests with either gcc or clang depending on the matrix parameters.
